summary: Apps v2 follow-up card created (todo/idea) for the paths MPI-256 v1 deferred: install-an-app flow, uninstalled-app path, multi-model apps, App UI design pass, 2nd app for app-to-app reuse, remaining pending-ux (staged-build gate + full reuse matrix). Dev-gate lifts at >=4 apps.

MPI-259 added to board todo column (next_id bumped 259->260). Apps v2 backlog expanded per user: install progress bar, verify install from BOTH Landing+Gallery entry points, audio+video inputs, multi-output apps. Living backlog - more to come.

Compact plan attached; maturity idea->planned. Apps v2: Apps/ subfolder (no resolver change), install+progress, uninstalled/both-entry-points, audio/video+multi-output, 2nd app+reuse matrix, UI pass, staged-gate.
Moved MPI-259 from To do to To do.

Implementation started: flexible input seam (BaseApp = generic host, inputSchema-driven, output always >=1 image/video is the only constant) + 2nd app app-sdxl-4k (multi-model sdxl-nsfw+nvidia-pid, positive-only, chroma-flash preview).
Derived checklist from plan + flexible-seam decision.

Flexible input seam SHIPPED (MpiBaseApp = generic host, media slot gated on inputSchema; output = only constant). 2nd app sdxl-4k wired (op in 4 files, App_sdxl_4k.json, multi-model sdxl-nsfw+nvidia-pid, media-free, reuses MpiAppImageRegen). inject test 4/4 green. LIVE-verified in running app: tile+badge+multi-model detail rows+Install button. Install flow already multi-model-capable (MPI-256), rendered; not run to completion; progress-bar still pending.

B SHIPPED+live-verified: App Library install = aggregated %-bar (N models each 1/N, serial fill) + Cancel-all, full-width bar stacked above Cancel; bar 52-54% live, then install completed -> Ready -> Open (disabled on Landing per canOpen). C partial: entry-point parity structural (one apps:open handler), canOpen live-verified, submit-guard + reuse-to-Library in code; live gallery-radial-open + uninstalled-reuse still to exercise. docs/apps.md updated (Install progress). Next: D (user edits workflow: image+video+audio inputs + multi-output).

D1 gen-core plumbing landed+verified: (1) capture filter broadened to PREFIX match output_image*/output_video* (commandExecutor.js:1296, no single-output regression, 12-case unit-pass); (2) media-kind title-force now PATTERN-based /^input_(video|audio|image)(_N)?$/i (comfyController.js:1022, fixes lowercase/numbered MpiString-video remote break, both-engine). User split test workflows: App_sdxl_4k.json is now the MULTI-IMAGE variant (input_image + input_image_2, 3x output_image, NO audio/video); video/audio workflow coming separately. inject test re-pointed to image variant, 4/4 green. Still todo D1: AppDef outputs count + submitAppGeneration placeholder alloc, op mediaInputs (2 image slots), polymorphic slot UI in MpiBaseApp, app result pane shows N. Nothing committed yet (B+C+D1-plumbing on disk).

D1 polymorphic slot UI landed (MpiBaseApp: schema-driven media groups, dynamic-until-cap, numbered, multi-select file-pick, drag-drop, remove+renumber, seed-restore). Subagent bug caught+fixed: invented --accent-1 token (nonexistent) for dragover -> --accent-frost; verified no hardcoded colors, real tokens, clean cleanup, node --check ok. LIVE: sdxl-4k opens, renders 1 image group max:2 + drop zone "Drop up to 2 images" + prompt. NOT yet live-tested: dynamic-add on real upload (needs project+files). New workflow app_video_test.json exported (Input_video/_2 MpiString + Input_audio LoadAudio -> Output_video/_2 MpiSaveVideo). REFINED D1.5: TWO gate mechanisms per media type - VIDEO self-gates in workflow (capture-what-ran, MUST verify gated MpiSaveVideo emits no executed); IMAGE/AUDIO cannot self-gate -> app-side outputSchema.when drops placeholder-junk cards. Video app op+AppDef still todo (needs video model choice).

D1 CODE-COMPLETE. Result pane shows all N outputs (_showResults; generation:complete + onComplete carry additive items/groups, no change to existing item readers); result-media CSS wraps to grid via :has(). docs/apps.md documents polymorphic media slots + multi-output. node --check clean, inject 4/4. Live-render verified; real generation NOT run (mutates user project + GPU) - handed to user: open project -> drop 0/1/2 images -> Run -> expect 3 cards + all in pane. Gating stays D1.5 (user exploring workflow-side image/audio gating separately). Nothing committed yet.

PAUSED - user testing in the live app (do not run anything). User authoring special Comfy nodes that detect per-node output -> gate everything INSIDE workflows (covers image/audio, not just video). If it lands, capture-what-ran covers all types, D1.5 app-side gate is DELETED (may change injection rules, out of scope now). Awaiting user test results. RESUME: verify D1 live (open project -> drop 0/1/2 images -> Run sdxl-4k -> expect N cards + all in pane), then decide D1.5 fate, wire app_video_test (needs video model), commit batch (B+C+D1 all uncommitted).
